name: xclone
description: A clone of the popular social media platform X, previously known as twitter.

scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm run test:ci --prefix frontend
scripts.deps:check: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix backend --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix frontend --audit-level=high
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
